author: Go viral
text: Thank you so much for launching Instagram lite version. Its working faster on devices less than 2GB RAM. I'm very exciting for this lite version.

author: Ajay Singh Chauhan
text: This lite version is awesome !! And there is no specific tab for that annoying Reels and that's a bonus!!!!! But there are some minor lags while opening new posts and while switching to different tabs !! So please make better !! Otherwise everything is Awesome !!!!

author: Soorya Ravindran
text: App is good, has all the basic features, but the screen resolution is less, doesn't occupies the full screen. And also there is no native dark mode. If those features are added, this would be a great app.

author: Vishnu AR
text: It's not working!!!! When I tap on something, it isn't loading and says "something went wrong" actually you should fix so many issues if you want to get 5 star rating from me! I thought this app would be one of the best, but I'm so disappointed with this application.

author: ꧁༺ɢօʋɨռɖ ʝɦǟ༻꧂
text: Instagram Lite makes it easier to bring you closer to the people and things you love. The Instagram Lite app is small, fast and works on all networks. Enjoy the best features of INSTA like connecting with friends, sharing what you’re up to, or seeing what’s new from others all over the world. Explore our community where you can feel free to be yourself and share everything from your daily moments to life's highlights. Express Yourself and Connect With Friends

author: Ayush Víshwakarma
text: There is nothing like refresh. When you refresh the feed it doesn't get refreshed. And dark mode is still missing. By the way the app is awsome and the plus point is there is no specific reels button that annoy you. Please solve this problem ASAP.

author: Anushyy
text: I like the lite version of Instagram. It feels very simple. But it is very basic version of Instagram and some of the features are not there yet. There are bugs and I believe they will fix it in the future updates. The loading is little slow but it can run in slow internet connection. Well I'm glad there is a lite version for Instagram and I really like it ! ❤

author: Ramy Ahmed
text: How come that a 'lite' version runs much slower than the full version, and on the same exact device? And why does every single action require a loading bar before it opens, even switching tabs?! This is certainly not a lighter version. This is an outdated website within an app container. I was really hoping for a simpler version of Instagram with only the original features, and without Reels and all the other distractions added lately, but what you created here is a huge disappointment.

author: Fayis Ismail
text: I've been using this app for a while now and I can say that it needs a lot of improvement. There are a lot of bugs and the lite version is missing many features. There are a lot of features that are missing which were important. There is no sticker support. It doesn't support voice messages and there are no camera filters or any kind of effects. We can't even add close friends in the lite version. I hope the developers improve it.

author: Tirtha Adhikary
text: Apps pretty good but the dark mode sucks. Can't see anything it's all black also the fonts are black. Also one other bug. Who ever uses full screen mode including me instead of nav bar the bottom portion where the nav bar stays is blank, where The Home Icon, search icon and the other 3 icons should be. Instead they stay above the nav bar space that we don't use. We have switched to gesture full screen mode, so the app needs to fix this problem.

author: phadhi girl rittika sharma
text: It is a very pretty version.it provides us all the features of instagram in one short short aap but its features like dark mode are not yet arrived here .so ,it needs some improvement

author: Barathi Kanya
text: This app is a waste😬. If this app is updated and works properly I'll surely give 5 stars. I'm not able to post sometimes. Fix this problem first 🤦‍♀️. It is taking a lot of time to load🙄. Please fix this problem.

author: mahi kumari xii d . 27
text: It felt exactly like facebook to me. And i didn't have much trouble in using it. 💜💜 Both apps ( Instagram, Instagram lite ) are very good. Install the app as you like bcoz I used both apps and i had no problem with both. Both the apps are excellent to use..... 💜💨😻

author: Mohit

You can't react to stories Since it is a lighter version I am ok with curret app except the above mentioned.If you fix these things it will be great.

author: Aman Kesarwani
text: Fix some issues and add features:- 1)) introduce dark(night) mode 2)) not preload igtv or reels videos (because it is lite app and we use lite apps because we want more in less data) 3)) Give data saver mode to loas images in very low quality 4)) Fix other issues of app stability.

author: Sumit Saren
text: It's a great alternative of Instagram and the best part why I left the original to this lite version is because of no ads in lite and also because the feeds are not to addictive.However a lot of improvements are needed in this like specially the older post always stay on top so for newer post you have to scroll down which is to irritating also you cannot zoom on posts.But since it is newly launched I hope this gets fixed soon as this lite version looks better than the original.

author: Sree Charan
text: This app is pointless. When you can open this in browser, why build an app again? - Opening in Browser is much better. - Photos are cropped. - There is a bug while seeing "more" in the captions. - No stories - Doesn't open exact profile link or video link. Cannot watch a single video.

author: Sayan Sameer
text: Just not good enough yet. No dark theme. Couldn't visit my 2nd account because it just keeps asking for code sent to my phone and when I enter it, it asks for it again and again. The stories don't work properly too. 3/5.

author: Brijtekken
text: Thanks for this... i didn't expected Facebook will do such thing. But could you please include a total black dark mode. To reduce the eye strain. It not easy always to use Instagram in white theme. So please do include a complete black dark mode. I do only texting and messaging rarely That's all.

author: Harsh Jadhav
text: Its a nice app But the problem is that while watching stories of my friends its not go to next page its just stop at one story of only particular post so we have to Struggle to change the page again and again But it's Quite Good And nice App. Only thing is Just Add Music option while posting image With Music please its a humble Request to Instagram Team

author: Angie Soli
text: So this lite version is okay .. just few bugs need to be fixed. I opened stories and couldn't get out of it as it showed me "error" when i tried to close it. Another thing, it takes long time to reload my follow requests idk why.

text: Really a good app for low end devices. Very light app, no bug at all. I would like to suggest some further improvements from my side, 1. Give support for reels. 2. Give option for dark mode. 3. Give direct message sort option like general and primary. Thank you.❤️

text: The app is the worst Instagram experience I've had it felt like I went back in time to 2017 but couldn't vote on stories etc. The app could have just had the same functionality as The original Instagram but it fell like a browser app that has less functionality. It horrible I wish I could give it 0 stars. Uninstalled

author: Queena Marie
text: 4 stars because: - I can finally see fancy/special/aesthetic fonts using the lite version of Instagram. My phone itself couldn't read special fonts in any other app so this point is a big thumbs up! 👍🏻 - works just as fine as the actual Instagram app, it's a bit laggy but I'm fine with it. 😘 ❗BUT❗ - the emojis used in the lite version is different from my phone's system emoji, causing me to see squares on some exclusive emojis. I hope this can be fixed! 🥰 - dark mode please 🤣

text: I installed this app just so I could get back on Instagram using my phone because the original is givk my phone problems. This app is so slow when loading notifications and it doesn't have access to many things that us as the users want to use. It has limitations that I consider as useless but please try by all means to fix these

Please try again later.". Also, I cannot vote for polls in stories or give an answer to the public questions and although it is the lite version of the original app, I think these should be included. After those fixes, it will be a great app.

Thank you!

author: Tae Texting fever

author: Prasanth Ganesan

text: This App Is So Good. I Love This App. But One Problem Is It Did Not Have 'Theme' As Well As 'Video Chat' Option. If It is Enabled Then It Will Might Good.

author: Harikrishnan
text: Its surely consumes less data than original app, but many of you may not get comfortable with this interface. One of the major problems I faced was that stories are getting replayed many times without me doing anything. The next major issue is that if you dont like a post it comes to your feed everytime over and over again until you like the post. Hope Instgram Team will find a solution to these problems

author: AlameZone Tech
text: I'm really excited for this Lite Version. But my Security is better than everything, i have already enabled two factor authentication on my account before using this version, but the time i was log into my account using this Version, my login details Password and Username was been successfully logged in without asking for That Two factor authentication Codes. You better Check that Issue of 2FA Bypass and fix it.

author: Piyush AryaPrakash
text: It's good to see that they are providing a lite version. But it doesn't even work . It's better to use in chrome than downloading lite. What's the problem - The feeds never get refreshed . You just have to scroll down and when you click refresh still you see the same feeds. Doesn't support links . Lags too much . Too much annoying while using the messenger. Despite having a good internet connection it keeps laging saying something went wrong. It's too slow

author: Meisya Nurulia
text: Honestly, I just found out that Instagram has the lite version and I'm happy. because it has been a long time since I wanted Instagram to have a lite version for my small capacity cellphone. and I'm not that disappointed when using it. 💛💛🌻✨

author: Eymaan Mustafa
text: Not smooth at all considering how little data is required to run it. Notifications' tab has to be refreshed either while using the app or when its closed. Lags as well. I opened a chat and the messages weren't showing up...even when they did they weren't completely loading

author: nikhil nikhil
text: My phone is working on 2G network but it works very well , but there are some problems such as we can't upload videos, we can't answer any stickers, questions, polls, etc... and if we didn't like a post that post remain in the feed until we like it and also we can't see any live , if instagram try to solve this problems it will be the best app than now.But I always like instagram♡.

author: ɳiƙ
text: I love the smooth interface. So far, something that I've been waiting for from Instagram has finally come. Works well on my Nokia with Android 9 Pie. Tough there might still improvements. Also, please don't autoplay the video feed on timeline. Keep up the good work.

author: TANMOY SEN
text: Instagram Lite App Play Store will add three new options to the new update 1. "Data Saver", 2. "Multiple Photos", 3. "Video Call and Voice Record ". We request you to give these three options very soon, then we Instagram Lite app users will be very, very happy. Thanks.

author: Liaqatali Nazari
text: One of the most annoying issue that I have faced since using Instagram is it's video autoplay. It's a major problem for those who don't have enough access to internet. I hope Instagram time work on this issue

author: aenean
text: I'm happy that Instagram finally has the lite version. I've been waiting this for years. However, it still needs many improvements. A smoother UI, and I suppose the dark mode too. Keep it up. If FB lite version can do it, I'm sure you can too. 😄
